name: Miglior Cat Can Chicken & Turkey Pate 400g
description: Meat and animal derivatives 50%, Chicken, 5%, Salmon5%, cereals, Fish and fish derivatives, Minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 10%, Crude fat 6%, Crude fibers 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
